en_title: Microsoft Comments on Yet Another The Elder Scrolls 6 No-Show
cn_title: 微软回应《上古卷轴6》再度缺席：时机成熟自会亮相
subtitle: 八年等待，何时是头？
opus_summary: 《上古卷轴6》自2018年公布至今已满八年，上周Xbox游戏展示会上再度缺席。微软内容主管Matt Booty透露已看过实机演示，表示进展顺利，正式展示时意味着游戏即将发售。陶德·霍华德此前多次强调游戏仍需时日，但等待是为了品质。

paragraphs.en: The announcement of The Elder Scrolls 6 is exactly eight years old. The Skyrim follow-up was revealed on Sunday, June 10, 2018, during Bethesda’s E3 conference in Los Angeles, with a teaser trailer that offered fans next to nothing. And in the eight years since, fans still know next to nothing.
paragraphs.cn: 《上古卷轴6》公布至今已整整八年。这款《天际》的续作于2018年6月10日（周日）在洛杉矶B社E3发布会上亮相，当时仅放出一段预告片，几乎没透露任何实质内容。而八年过去，粉丝们依然所知甚少。

paragraphs.en: It was yet another no-show for The Elder Scrolls 6 at the Xbox Games Showcase last week, and as we’ve reported, fans are starting to worry about how old they’re getting waiting for the sequel to the all-conquering Skyrim . When will The Elder Scrolls 6 be revealed properly? Later this year? Next year? 2028? It’s hard to say at this point.
paragraphs.cn: 上周的Xbox游戏展示会上，《上古卷轴6》再度缺席。正如我们此前报道的，粉丝们开始担心自己等这款《天际》续作等到老去。《上古卷轴6》究竟何时才会正式亮相？今年晚些时候？明年？2028年？目前很难说。

paragraphs.en: In an interview with Variety , Xbox chief content officer Matt Booty didn’t give away much at all about The Elder Scrolls 6, but did suggest that when Bethesda does get around to showing it off, it will signal that the game itself will be released soon. Booty also offered some reassurance, saying he’s visited Bethesda to watch The Elder Scrolls 6 being played, and “it’s coming along well.” As for when the reveal will be… “at the right time.”
paragraphs.cn: 在接受《综艺》采访时，Xbox内容主管Matt Booty并未透露太多关于《上古卷轴6》的信息，但他暗示，当B社最终展示这款游戏时，就意味着它即将发售。Booty还安抚道，他曾亲赴B社观看《上古卷轴6》的实机演示，并表示「进展顺利」。至于何时正式公布……「时机成熟时」。

paragraphs.en: “I would say one of the more challenging balancing acts of someone in a job like mine is balancing that you want to go show the world all the cool stuff you’re working on, and you want to get them excited early, but we also know that we want to wait till the right moment,” Booty said.
paragraphs.cn: 「我认为像我这样职位的人面临的最大挑战之一，就是平衡两方面：一方面你想向世界展示你正在做的所有酷东西，尽早让大家兴奋起来；但另一方面，我们也知道要等到合适的时机，」Booty说道。

paragraphs.en: “And when you decide to show it, you want it to be the best you’ve got. And also that when you show the game, you’re also giving them a promise of, hey, it’s coming soon. So I can tell you, having visited Bethesda and sat with Todd and seen Elder Scrolls playing, it looks amazing, and it’s coming along well. And we’ll make sure to announce it and really reveal it at the right time.”
paragraphs.cn: 「而当你决定展示时，你希望它是最好的作品。同时，展示游戏也意味着你向玩家许下承诺：嘿，它很快就要来了。所以我可以告诉你，我去过B社，和陶德坐在一起，亲眼看到了《上古卷轴》的实机画面，它看起来棒极了，进展顺利。我们会确保在合适的时机正式公布和展示它。」

paragraphs.en: The last time Todd Howard talked about The Elder Scrolls 6 was in March 2026 , when he joked that we should all pretend Bethesda hadn't announced it. This is a recurring theme; in February, Howard admitted — once again — that he would have preferred not to have announced the game so early.
paragraphs.cn: 陶德·霍华德上一次谈论《上古卷轴6》是在2026年3月，当时他开玩笑说，大家应该假装B社从未公布过这款游戏。这是一个反复出现的主题；今年2月，霍华德再次承认，他宁愿当初没有这么早公布这款游戏。

paragraphs.en: Howard has warned eager fans as recently as last November that the game is " still a long way off, " and has even teased that he may just shadow-drop it. He reiterated in February that "it's gonna be a while yet," and confirmed that, "We're able to play it, we're about to pass a big milestone internally, the majority of the studio is on the game and some of our partners."
paragraphs.cn: 霍华德在去年11月还警告心急的粉丝，游戏「还有很长一段路要走」，甚至开玩笑说可能会直接突袭发售。他在2月再次强调「还需要一段时间」，并确认「我们已经能玩到了，内部即将通过一个重要里程碑，工作室大部分人手以及部分合作伙伴都在参与这款游戏。」

paragraphs.en: But Howard has also claimed all this waiting is necessary for the game to be great.
paragraphs.cn: 但霍华德也表示，所有这些等待都是为了让游戏变得出色所必需的。

paragraphs.en: “What do fans really want?” he said in December of last year . “Do they want a game that comes out before it should and doesn’t meet their expectations? Or do they want the turkey that is in the oven for long enough to be delicious when it finally comes out of the oven, you know? That’s what I think people are going to want. So, we’re going to take our time and as long as it needs to be great.”
paragraphs.cn: 「粉丝们真正想要的是什么？」他在去年12月说道。「他们是想要一款提前推出、但达不到预期的游戏？还是想要一只在烤箱里烤得足够久、出炉时美味无比的火鸡？我认为人们想要的是后者。所以我们会慢慢来，花足够的时间把它做精。」

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Xbox Games Showcase 2026 , if you fancy reading about loads of video games that aren't The Elder Scrolls VI.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解一大堆不是《上古卷轴6》的游戏，可以看看2026年Xbox游戏展示会上公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在X上通过@wyp100找到他，或通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系他，保密邮箱为wyp100@proton.me。

manual_approved_issues.detail: opus_summary targets 70-80 non-space characters and must stay within 60-110, got 114
source contains 'Bethesda', but required dictionary translation 'B社/贝塞斯达' is missing
